meaning: adj.不擅社交的,非社交的,反社会的
examples: One forensic psychiatrist described him as having an incurable antisocial personality disorder.
One has to wonder: why don't we apply the same social norms to checking phones during meals, meetings and conversations as we do to other antisocial behaviors?
They'll think you're being antisocial if you don't go.
Poor nutrition during pregnancy almost triples the rate of antisocial personality disorder in adulthood.
Butchie, living in a derelict motel, is semi-feral mangy, antisocial, and narrowly focussed on his own survival.
